summary: Comprehensive testing of MyGenie customer app OTP auth, delivery address, and distance API features for restaurant 509

minor_issues.impact: Table configuration endpoint not accessible without auth token

minor_warnings.issue: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies warnings
minor_warnings.impact: Compilation warnings but no functional impact

passed_tests: TC-D01: Landing page loads for restaurant 509
TC-D02: Delivery mode landing page shows toggle with Delivery pre-selected
TC-D03: Takeaway mode landing page shows toggle with Takeaway pre-selected
TC-D04: Phone + name capture form shows on takeaway/delivery landing
TC-D05: OTP flow - known phone navigates to PasswordSetup with correct welcome message
TC-D07: Skip for now navigates to menu page, not back to landing
TC-D08: Delivery address page requires auth - redirects unauthenticated users
TC-D09: Distance API near location returns shipping_status:Yes with charge
TC-D10: Distance API far location returns shipping_status:No
TC-D11: Backend health check returns Customer App API message
TC-D12: CRM health check returns DinePoints API message
TC-D13: Check-customer API works for known customers (Parikshit, Kriele, Vishal)
TC-D15: All 30 unit tests pass for PasswordSetupOtp

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (8/8 core tests passed, 30/30 unit tests passed)
